facts.claim: Discover Celebrity Apex. View the award-winning luxury cruise ship's deck plan, staterooms, dining options, things to do and upcoming sailings.
Celebrity Apex is an Edge-class cruise ship operated by Celebrity Cruises, a subsidiary of Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd.
Constructed at Chantiers de l'Atlantique in Saint-Nazaire, France, she is the second vessel in the company's Edge class of ships, following the delivery of her sister ship, Celebrity Edge, in 2018.
